Tdb_BCEKL84_serie_4emeRev

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 743
Recv ID: 763
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 51
Func Name: Tableau de bord

    "sentbytes": "23010000ED06",
    "name": "Lecture des paramètres jaugeage",
    "deny_sds": [],

    "minbytes": 17,

    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "+Lanterne (CAN)": {
        "firstbyte": 4,

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "APC (CAN)": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Contact ceinture de sécurité conducteur (CAN)": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Contact frein de parking": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Débitmètre : absence d'information (CAN)": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "Débitmètre : absence d'information (CAN) mémo": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Détection défaut charge batterie (message) CAN": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Détection défaut pression huile (CAN)": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Etat information charge batterie (voyant) CAN": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Etat mano contact pression huile": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Feux brouillard AR (CAN)": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Feux brouillard AV (CAN)": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Feux croisement (CAN)": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Feux route (CAN)": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Incident frein (NIVOCOD)": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Information capteur GNV/GNC (Ohms) CAN": {
        "firstbyte": 14
      },
      "Information capteur jauge GPL (Ohms) CAN": {
        "firstbyte": 12
      },
      "Information carburant consommé (mm3) CAN": {
        "firstbyte": 17
      },
      "Information température moteur (°C) CAN": {
        "firstbyte": 16
      },
      "Jauge carburant (circuit ouvert)": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Jauge carburant (circuit ouvert) mémo": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Jauge carburant (court-circuit)": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Jauge carburant (court-circuit) mémo": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Jauge carburant GPL (circuit ouvert)": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Jauge carburant GPL (circuit ouvert) mémo": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Jauge carburant GPL (court-circuit)": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Jauge carburant GPL (court-circuit) mémo": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "Jauge GPL : absence d'information (CAN)": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Jauge GPL : absence d'information (CAN) mémo": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Lave Glace": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Niveau huile (circuit ouvert)": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Niveau huile (circuit ouvert) mémo": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Niveau huile (court-circuit)": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Niveau huile (court-circuit) mémo": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 8
      },
      "Réveil_TdB par UCC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },

        "bitoffset": 6
      },

        "bitoffset": 4

        "firstbyte": 7,

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },

  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "sentbytes": "1081",
    "name": "Ouverture de session par défaut",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Mode de diagnostic": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Panne mémorisée": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Panne présente": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Panne type": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "230000000001",
    "name": "ReadMemoryByAddress",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds",
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Adresse en mémoire": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Nombre d'octets": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Type de memoire": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "sentbytes": "312200",
    "name": "Routine Activation Mesure NH",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "sentbytes": "310100",
    "name": "Routine Recalage L2",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "sentbytes": "310200",
    "name": "Routine RESTART TDB",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "sentbytes": "312100",
    "name": "Routine START LOADER",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "Start Diagnostic Session",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Session Name": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "3E01",
    "name": "TesterPresent (avec ou sans réponse)",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Avec ou sans réponse": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "3D0000000001",
    "name": "WriteMemoryByAddress",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds",
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Adresse en mémoire": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Nombre d'octets": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Type de memoire": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  }
]
